name: Silex Systems Ltd
description: Silex Systems Limited (ASX: SLX) is an Australian technology company dedicated to the commercialisation of its proprietary SILEX laser-based isotope separation technology. The company focuses on applying this innovative technology across three primary global markets: uranium production and enrichment for nuclear power, silicon enrichment for the emerging quantum computing industry, and medical isotope enrichment for advanced cancer therapies. Headquartered in Lucas Heights, New South Wales, Silex continues to drive global innovation through its unique laser-based solutions, aiming to provide sustainable and efficient materials for critical future-facing industries.
